'''鈭歵-p-ch-t''' ('''katapchetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiddlefart|fiddlefart]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiddlefart|fiddlefart]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-p-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| katapchetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitapchetoko|thitapchetoko]] || [[word:jitapchetoko|jitapchetoko]] || [[word:shitapchetoko|shitapchetoko]] || [[word:kitapchetoko|kitapchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutapchetoko|thuthutapchetoko]] || [[word:jujutapchetoko|jujutapchetoko]] || [[word:shushutapchetoko|shushutapchetoko]] || [[word:kukutapchetoko|kukutapchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutapchetoko|thutapchetoko]] || [[word:jutapchetoko|jutapchetoko]] || [[word:shutapchetoko|shutapchetoko]] || [[word:kutapchetoko|kutapchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutapchetoko|thutapchetoko]] || [[word:jutapchetoko|jutapchetoko]] || [[word:shutapchetoko|shutapchetoko]] || [[word:kutapchetoko|kutapchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetapchetoko|thetapchetoko]] || [[word:jetapchetoko|jetapchetoko]] || [[word:shetapchetoko|shetapchetoko]] || [[word:ketapchetoko|ketapchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotapchetoko|thothotapchetoko]] || [[word:jojotapchetoko|jojotapchetoko]] || [[word:shoshotapchetoko|shoshotapchetoko]] || [[word:kokotapchetoko|kokotapchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotapchetoko|thotapchetoko]] || [[word:jotapchetoko|jotapchetoko]] || [[word:shotapchetoko|shotapchetoko]] || [[word:kotapchetoko|kotapchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotapchetoko|thotapchetoko]] || [[word:jotapchetoko|jotapchetoko]] || [[word:shotapchetoko|shotapchetoko]] || [[word:kotapchetoko|kotapchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tapchetoko|th忙tapchetoko]] || [[word:j忙tapchetoko|j忙tapchetoko]] || [[word:sh忙tapchetoko|sh忙tapchetoko]] || [[word:k忙tapchetoko|k忙tapchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatapchetoko|thathatapchetoko]] || [[word:jajatapchetoko|jajatapchetoko]] || [[word:shashatapchetoko|shashatapchetoko]] || [[word:kakatapchetoko|kakatapchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatapchetoko|thatapchetoko]] || [[word:jatapchetoko|jatapchetoko]] || [[word:shatapchetoko|shatapchetoko]] || [[word:katapchetoko|katapchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatapchetoko|thatapchetoko]] || [[word:jatapchetoko|jatapchetoko]] || [[word:shatapchetoko|shatapchetoko]] || [[word:katapchetoko|katapchetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
